No COGS candidates were provided. Chose direct voyage/shipping operating cost components from the full Income Statement preview that best match cost of sales for this shipping company. Manual review recommended because the statement does not present an explicit 'Cost of sales' subtotal and these rows may represent the operating cost bundle used as COGS.

candidates.why: Best explicit populated overhead/administrative expense row; appears to subtotal SG&A components.

SG&A component, but inferior to the explicit subtotal row if using hierarchy.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

variables.notes: Selected only the explicit populated SG&A/overhead subtotal row per hierarchy. Did not add underlying labor/other components to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Total interest expense line, but underlying recurring components are available so not preferred.
Recurring borrowing interest component; preferred granular interest expense.

Recurring interest-related expense component; include if available.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of interest on lease liabilities; do not use alongside the main line.
Balance sheet debt balance, not interest expense.
Balance sheet debt balance, not interest expense.

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance cost components and excluded the total 'Interest expenses' row to avoid double counting. Excluded 'Capitalised interest on newbuildings' because it is capitalised rather than expensed, and excluded the supplemental lease-interest row as a duplicate of the main lease-interest line.

Equity component only, not total book equity.

Total equity line; slightly less preferred than Shareholders' Equity - Total because it could include NCI if present.
Balancing row, not actual equity measure.

candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet equation, not equity.

variables.notes: Using shareholders' equity as preferred book equity, with Total Equity as fallback priority if needed. No separate non-controlling interest line is shown.
